change all this sentence to more technical

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
Upon finalizing the project, I conducted a comprehensive review of the Issued for Tender Drawings, Issued for Construction Drawings, Project Specifications, and Scope of Work. My review focused on the Mechanical Engineering Drawings, where I studied all details, clarifying any design discrepancies through Request for Information (RFI). The mechanical services under scrutiny included the Heating, Ventilation, and Air Conditioning (HVAC), Plumbing and Drainage, and Fire Fighting System. 

Using AutoCAD software, I developed construction shop drawings, ensuring coordination with all disciplines. In parallel, I began preparations for material submittals and equipment capacity finalizations. Of particular note among the project's equipment were Air Handling Units (AHUs), Package Air Conditioning Units (PACUs), Potable Pumps, Solar Water Heaters, Variable Refrigerant Flow (VRF) systems, Fire Fighting Pumps, Exhaust/Fresh Air, and Smoke Fans. 

As part of my equipment selection process, I conducted Pump Head Loss calculations and Duct Static Pressure calculations to identify the best options.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: I completed the Duct routing shop drawing for all the building before finalizing the selection, based on the final Ducting Layout I carried out static Pressure Calculation, I used ductulator, Mc Grill Airflow corporation Duct design System, pressure loss for complete straight duct, including fittings and all all accessories been carried out the final required static pressure for the equipment was finalized

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
Following my completion of duct routing shop drawings for the entire building, I conducted a static pressure calculation to finalize equipment selection. Based on the final ducting layout, I used tools like ductulator, Mc Gill Airflow corporation Duct design system, and pressure loss calculations for complete straight ducts, including all fittings and accessories. 

Using these calculations, I arrived at the final required static pressure for the equipment selection.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
Once the equipment selections were finalized and approved by the consultant, next step was procurement. 
•	I started with obtaining quotations from different suppliers and prepare the comparison sheet that includes the prices with suppliers and manufacturer’s name including the key specifications for the product. 
•	I checked the equipment’s compliance with specifications, best price and delivery time- which was most important as it was a fast track project and I was not in a stage to compensate any late deliveries. 
•	After finalization I sent all the details through purchase request to the purchase department for them to issue orders for procurement.
	During construction phase, I had to give extra care for safety of our site team during the site execution as the plant was on high level and a special scaffold platform was constructed for our works. We had a rigid timeline for completion of works, also at the same time safety of all personnel was a special concern.  
	After the delivery of all items, I verified delivery notes and equipment and immediately started raising MIR- Material inspection requests for the first fix items (Ducts, PEX Pipes Fittings, GI Conduits, Cable ladders etc.) as well as major equipment’s in order to avoid any potential delay in commencement of work. 
I was familiar with installation of all equipment & systems in this project but I had to learn and work with new systems in this project, for e.g Medical Gas System 
Once the final installation , I get installation approval from supervision consultant and I all the electrical connections are made as per the manufacturer recommendation. I prepared pre-commissioning and Pre commissioning check List , Testing and commissioning procedures for all Equipments . I call the manufacturer representative for initial start-up and closely monitor all the functionality of all equipment before call Client for the Final Testing and commissioning . The testing of commissioning of all equipment’s are carried out successfully in presents of Clent . 
         I prepared the Final handing over documents according to the project specification. The  provision of tools, Spare Parts and Maintenance Materials and all the items where itemized from the project documentation and given a unique reference number. The list includes the reference number, a description of the item and the appropriate Specification Section and Paragraph. Guarantee , Warantee certificate were provided with the final handing over documents along with As- Built drawings. 
     
Change all the sentence in a different pattern

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
The initial step after finalizing the equipment selections and receiving consultant approval was procurement. The procurement process involved obtaining quotations from multiple suppliers, creating a comparison sheet with supplier and manufacturer details, including critical product specifications, and verifying equipment compliance with specifications, price, and delivery time. A crucial aspect of the procurement phase was timely delivery, given the fast-track project schedule. Therefore, I liaised closely with the purchase department to ensure prompt procurement.

During the construction phase, the safety of our site team was a paramount concern, given the high-level plant location. To facilitate the safe execution of the works, a specialized scaffold platform was constructed. The project had a rigid timeline for completion, and safety remained a top priority throughout the execution of work.

Upon delivery of all items, I immediately verified delivery notes and equipment to preempt any potential delays in work commencement. I raised Material Inspection Requests (MIR) for first fix items like ducts, PEX pipes fittings, GI Conduits, cable ladders, and significant equipment to filter potential issues proactively.

Although familiar with the installation of all equipment & systems in the project, certain newly introduced systems, such as the Medical Gas System, necessitated learning new installation processes. I prepared the pre-commissioning and commissioning procedures for all equipment and systems and closely monitored the initial start-up process, seeking the manufacturer representatives' input.

Upon the successful testing and commissioning of all equipment, the final handover documents were prepared according to project specifications. These documents included a unique reference number for each item, accompanied by a list of tools, spare parts and maintenance materials. Additionally, guarantees, warranty certificates, and As-built drawings were included in the final handing over documents.
